title: Trumping 2025
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-06-29_trumping-2025_img_istock-485480338_ce7742c70ec8.jpg
After a chaotic 2025 dominated by tariffs, trade wars, actual wars and sanctions, it seemed hard to imagine 2026 could trump the chaos of last year. Yet, that thesis was proven wrong after just three days with the US President using 2025 as a warmup lap. After applying pressure via a naval blockade and military buildup, on the 3rd of January, the US undertook a stunning operation to capture Venezuelan President Maduro.
